meaning: v.閲嶈堪瑕佺偣,姒傛嫭,鎽樿
examples: To recapitulate briefly, the three main points are these...
It will be put up for sale under the terms already communicated to you, which, to recapitulate, call for a very minimum of publicity.
Let's just recapitulate the essential points.
Another possible point of resistance in London and Washington may have been strategic: the desire not to recapitulate the problems of Diego Garcia, part of the British Indian Ocean territory.
